text: The U.S. expansion positioned Klarna as a way to give buyers more choice, flexibility, and control at checkout.
The launch included Pay in 4 for interest-free installments and financing for larger eligible purchases.
Early international usage was strongest in categories such as electronics, fashion, and collectibles, suggesting higher-ticket use cases deserve focused measurement.
Eligibility depends on order value, location, currency, shipping origin, delivery method, category, and app version, so checkout education is a core launch requirement.
Returns are handled through eBay while Klarna adjusts or refunds the payment plan, creating a need for joined-up support content.
The resell feature connects Klarna purchases with pre-filled eBay listings, reinforcing the partnership's circular-commerce story.
